commands.repair_reason: No repair lane is needed: the patch has no discrete code defect and the remaining action is normal CI/security-scan merge handling.; Cleared: No patch-introduced security issue found; the Socket alert targets an existing host-linked openclaw peer lock entry, while the diff only bumps the LightClawBot fixture package and bundled ws metadata. commands.review_summary:
This PR updates the LightClawBot npm fixture pin and lockfile from lightclawbot 1.2.3 to 1.2.6, including the bundled ws version from 8.20.0 to 8.21.0.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a dependency-bump PR rather than a reported runtime bug. I verified the current pin, proposed diff, and generated report state from source inspection.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane is needed: the patch has no discrete code defect and the remaining action is normal CI/security-scan merge handling.
